base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of luigi_all_stars — a character (playable) from 1990 super mario world. Luigi (All-Stars version) — same pose-set as Mario but with Luigi-specific physics (higher jump, slippery). Same 1004×3618. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
